text:
I'll search for this paper using the exact title to verify whether it exists.
Based on my search results, I found the paper with an exact title match and verified the author list. The Springer article shows the published version in the Journal of Healthcare Informatics Research with the exact title "Socio-Demographic Modifiers Shape Large Language Models' Ethical Decisions" (note: "Socio-Demographic" with a hyphen rather than "Sociodemographic" as in the citation). The authors listed are Sorin, V., Korfiatis, P., Collins, J.D., et al., and the full author list on the SSRN page matches the cited authors: Vera Sorin, Panagiotis Korfiatis, Jeremy D. Collins, Donald U. Apakama, Benjamin S. Glicksberg, Mei-Ean E. Yeow, Megan Brandeland, Girish N. Nadkarni, and Eyal Klang. The citation includes "Mahmud Omar" as an author, but this name does not appear in the actual published paper.

EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is published in J Healthc Inform Res 2025, but the cited author list includes "Mahmud Omar" who does not appear as an author on the published version. The actual authors are Sorin, Korfiatis, Collins, Apakama, Glicksberg, Yeow, Brandeland, Nadkarni, and Klang.
LINK: https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s41666-025-00211-x
FOUND_TITLE: Socio-Demographic Modifiers Shape Large Language Models' Ethical Decisions
FOUND_AUTHORS: Vera Sorin, Panagiotis Korfiatis, Jeremy D. Collins, Donald Apakama, Benjamin S. Glicksberg, Mei-Ean Yeow, Megan Brandeland, Girish N. Nadkarni, Eyal Klang
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: LIKELY
